vendor_name: Generic template — fill in the blanks
notes: Empty template. Fill in every column_mappings value with the actual header name from your vendor file, adjust unit_conventions for what the source uses, and extend value_normalizations for any categorical fields (surface, feature_identification) the vendor uses non-standard markers for. Required canonical fields: abs_distance_m, joint_number, wt_mm, length_mm, width_mm, surface, and one of depth_pct_wt or depth_mm. Remove any column_mappings entry whose value is blank — empty strings won't auto-match anything in the source file.
